title: Blackboard Experience Entry
description: Schema for an individual experience file stored in panda-state/blackboard/experiences/

task_type.description: Category of task this experience was recorded from (e.g. feature, bugfix, refactor)

task_description.description: Human-readable description of the task that generated this experience

agent_team.description: Names of agents that participated in executing the task

wave_count.description: Number of execution waves that occurred during the task

audit_outcomes.description: Summary of audit results across all waves

pass.description: Number of audit checks that passed without modification

auto_fix.description: Number of audit checks that were automatically corrected

fail.description: Number of audit checks that failed and required manual resolution

lessons_learned.description: Key takeaways extracted from this experience for future sessions

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this experience was recorded

confidence.description: Confidence score for this experience (0.0 = low, 1.0 = high)

tags.description: Free-form labels for indexing and retrieval
